description: Dataset-level quality score definitions for Bigeye + Alation.

metrics.description: Dataset has at least one active Bigeye monitor.

metrics.formula: case when alert_count_7d = 0 then 100 when alert_count_7d <= 3 then 85 else 60 end
metrics.description: Recent alert volume as reliability signal.

metrics.formula: case when alation_endorsed then 100 else 40 end
case when alation_owner is not null and alation_steward is not null then 100 when alation_owner is not null or alation_steward is not null then 70 else 30 end
metrics.description: Dataset has both owner and steward metadata.

metrics.formula: case when alation_lineage_present then 100 else 50 end
metrics.description: Lineage is present for dataset in Alation.
